title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Aptech Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Aptech Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Aptech Advisory Limited in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aptech Advisory Limited:
Aptech Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech Advisory Limited!
